## Checklist

- [ ] New / modified skill follows the [Agent Skills specification](https://openagentskills.dev/docs/specification) (SKILL.md, YAML frontmatter, progressive disclosure)
- [ ] Skill is language-agnostic unless explicitly scoped
- [ ] `SKILL.md` is under 500 lines (depth in reference files)
- [ ] README updated if adding or modifying a skill
- [ ] Command registration updated if new command added
- [ ] Build / lint passes
